user_query: I'm planning a weekend getaway with my family and we want to explore a new city. Can you fetch information about the top tourist attractions in the city? Additionally, provide me with a list of rental car options available in the city. Lastly, find a family-friendly hotel with amenities like a swimming pool and playground.

TaskList.description: Fetch information about the top tourist attractions in the chosen city.
Get a list of rental car options available in the city.
Find a family-friendly hotel with amenities like a swimming pool and playground in the city.
